settings.title: About DriveEase
settings.subtitle: Making every journey memorable with premium vehicles, transparent pricing, and world-class service.

items.title: Safety First
items.description: Every vehicle undergoes rigorous maintenance checks and comes with comprehensive insurance coverage.

items.title: Transparent Pricing
items.description: No hidden fees, no surprises. What you see is what you pay — clear and honest pricing every time.

items.title: Customer Obsessed
items.description: Your satisfaction drives everything we do. From booking to return, we're here to make it seamless.

items.title: Eco Conscious
items.description: Our growing fleet of hybrid and electric vehicles reflects our commitment to a greener future.

settings.heading: Ready to Hit the Road?
settings.description: Browse our fleet and find the perfect vehicle for your next journey.
